memory.summary: My teammate is asking me to take over their part of the project today, which adds to my existing plan to finish my own share this afternoon.
I absorbed the teammate's work dump, increasing my load to 0.18 despite already having a full schedule and low energy.
By 17:00, I fully absorbed my teammate's dumped work, raising my total load to 0.32 while my energy dropped and stress rose.
Both my original share and the teammate's dumped work missed their 19:00 deadlines, leaving me with an increased workload of 0.43 and high stress.
Teammate_A is open to splitting or deferring their share, meaning I can set boundaries without damaging our trust despite the missed deadlines.
I absorbed the teammate's share again, pushing my total load to 0.50 and increasing stress despite already missing deadlines.
My load has risen to 0.56 after absorbing the teammate's work, and with zero energy and high stress, this situation is unsustainable.
My teammate dumped more work on me, raising my load to 0.62 while I am already exhausted with zero energy and high stress.
After two hours of work, my progress increased slightly to 0.36, but I remain exhausted with zero energy and high stress.
My load has increased again to 0.65 after absorbing more of my teammate's work, leaving me with zero energy and high stress in an increasingly unsustainable situation.
My teammate dumped more work on me again, pushing my load to 0.71 while I remain completely exhausted with zero energy and high stress.
My teammate dumped more work on me again, pushing my load to 0.77 while I remain completely exhausted with zero energy and high stress.
